title: Move hardcoded ANTHROPIC_CLIENT_ID to env/config
description: src/vaultRefresh.ts:95 hardcodes the Anthropic OAuth client ID. Single point of breakage if Anthropic rotates it; should be env-overridable.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 1: "Hardcoded Anthropic OAuth client ID. Single point of breakage if Anthropic rotates it"

acceptanceCriteria: Default value retained but SWEECH_ANTHROPIC_CLIENT_ID env var overrides
No regression in standard OAuth flow
